title: Public Relations
contentHtml: Public Relations Department is responsible for publication and highlight the all the new developments and activities through publication and distribution of Publicity Brochures, Pamphlets and other publicity Materials. Photographs of different products and publicity data display through Flex Display Boards at different locations in MCF. It also publishes Tender Notices/NIT/other Notices of various departments of MCF. All ceremonial functions, important events, new developments, sports events give due coverage by Electronic and Print Media in their esteemed newspapers and TV channels. It plays an important role in building both the corporate and social image of Railways. It also manages contents for social Media handles of MCF such as Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Koo, you tube etc.
